title: pilosella schultesii subsp. glaucoviridis
intro: Pilosella schultesii subsp. glaucoviridis, also known as a subspecies of the Plantain family, is a plant species with medicinal properties. It is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been traditionally used to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Preparations of Pilosella schultesii subsp. glaucoviridis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to create herbal remedies for its various health benefits.
